creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013
New Revision: 312266
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312266

Log:
  Webservice bindings for the Musicbrainz NGS site, also known as /ws/2.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/alastair/python-musicbrainz-ngs
  
  PR:		ports/176069
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>

Added:
  head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/
  head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/audio/Makefile

Modified: head/audio/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013	(r312265)
+++ head/audio/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013	(r312266)
@@ -622,6 +622,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-mpd
     SUBDIR += py-mpd2
     SUBDIR += py-musicbrainz2
+    SUBDIR += py-musicbrainzngs
     SUBDIR += py-mutagen
     SUBDIR += py-ogg
     SUBDIR += py-openal

Added: head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013	(r312266)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Created by: Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	musicbrainzngs
+PORTVERSION=	0.2
+CATEGORIES=	audio python
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	feld@feld.me
+COMMENT=	Python Musicbrainz NGS site bindings
+
+LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
+
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	alastair
+GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
+GH_PROJECT=	python-musicbrainz-ngs
+GH_COMMIT=	84e43a4
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013	(r312266)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (musicbrainzngs-0.2.tar.gz) = 53b1517a6a2f996a2db8bb5a51b80e05a04688daa28d7098b23e1ed59454a93a
+SIZE (musicbrainzngs-0.2.tar.gz) = 14397

Added: head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-descr	Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013	(r312266)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Webservice bindings for the Musicbrainz NGS site, also known as /ws/2.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/alastair/python-musicbrainz-ngs

Added: head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/py-musicbrainzngs/pkg-plist	Fri Feb 15 02:51:11 2013	(r312266)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/musicbrainzngs/musicbrainz.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/musicbrainzngs/musicbrainz.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/musicbrainzngs/mbxml.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/musicbrainzngs/mbxml.pyc

+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/musicbrainzngs/__init__.py
